race.comment: PRETTY PERKY (5) got off the mark stylishly over this trip at Strathalbyn last time. Draws well for Opperman, who sticks and finds a nice race to keep the ball rolling. EXPLICABLE (1) knuckled down strongly to go one better at Port Lincoln, after just missing there the start prior. Has struck winning form, though will need a smart steer from the sticky draw. DUO PERNA (3) continues to leave himself with too much to do when turning for home but does possess a strong turn of foot. Suspect him to relish the rise to the mile. If the tempo is genuine, he can cause a late scare. THINK TANK (8) drops back slightly in trip off a month in-between and boasts peaks that measure up. Don't dismiss.
